scripts.generate:openapi: pnpm exec node --input-type=module --eval "import { mkdir, readFile, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { parse } from 'yaml'; const source = await readFile('./openapi/openapi.yaml', 'utf8'); const document = parse(source); const output = '// This file is auto-generated from the /health OpenAPI contract.\n' + 'export const openApiDocument = ' + JSON.stringify(document, null, 2) + ' as const;\n'; await mkdir('./generated', { recursive: true }); await writeFile('./generated/openapi.ts', output, 'utf8');"
scripts.generate:types:
mkdir -p ./generated && rm -rf ./generated/types.ts ./generated/_types && pnpm exec openapi-ts --input ./openapi/openapi.yaml --output ./generated/_types && printf '%s
' '// This file is auto-generated from the /health OpenAPI contract.' 'export * from "./_types/types.gen.js";' > ./generated/types.ts
scripts.generate:client:
mkdir -p ./generated && rm -rf ./generated/client.ts ./generated/_client && pnpm exec openapi-ts --input ./openapi/openapi.yaml --output ./generated/_client --client @hey-api/client-fetch && printf '%s
' '// This file is auto-generated from the /health OpenAPI contract.' 'export * from "./_client/index.js";' > ./generated/client.ts
scripts.generate: pnpm run generate:openapi && pnpm run generate:types && pnpm run generate:client && pnpm run generate:zod
scripts.generate:check: pnpm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- generated openapi/openapi.yaml
scripts.build: pnpm run generate && pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsdown --config tsdown.config.ts --entry modules/contract/src/index.ts --out-dir modules/contract/dist
scripts.test:lint: pnpm --dir ../.. exec biome check modules/contract/package.json modules/contract/src modules/contract/test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:type && pnpm run test:lint && pnpm run build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project contract
